title: Personalised Butterfly Name Throw Blanket, Custom Monogram Blanket for Girls Women, Blue Butterflies Gift, Soft Initial Letter Flannel Throws for Christmas Birthday (02-Butterfly 2)
features: 🦋 Beautiful Personalised Butterfly Design Personalised name blanket features an elegant butterfly and letter design, creating a charming and eye-catching look. Add a name or meaningful text to turn it into a truly unique keepsake—perfect for girls, women and anyone who loves soft, decorative home accents.

🥰 Ultra-Soft Premium Flannel Material Made from high-quality flannel, this blanket is exceptionally soft, lightweight and cosy. Gentle on the skin yet warm enough for everyday use, it offers comfort all year round. Designed to resist wrinkling, shedding and fading for long-lasting use.

🎨 Clear, Vibrant Printing Advanced printing technology ensures rich colours and sharp details that stay bright over time. The butterfly artwork and personalised name remain clear and beautiful, even after repeated washing. Printed on one side for a smooth, clean finish.

📏 4 Practical Sizes for Everyday Use Available in 30×40in, 40×50in, 50×60in and 60×80in, suitable for children, teens and adults. Ideal as a lap blanket, sofa throw, bed blanket or cosy companion for reading, relaxing or travel.

🧼 Easy Care & Everyday Convenience Machine washable on a gentle cycle with cold water. This personalised flannel blanket is designed to keep its softness and shape without shrinking, making it easy to care for and perfect for daily use.
